name: Session-Replay Envelope
summary: Thin binding/ordering contract for local session replay (#992): an ordered session of Web Traces spans plus correlated references to the Web Contexts snapshot (starting state), the Web States ChangeRecord journal (the determinism anchor — re-applied, executing no application JS), and Web Events-identified actions (correlation only). Redefines none of the four referenced schemas. Carries a snapshot↔journal consistency precondition (a drifted snapshot is refused/flagged, never applied blind) and an explicit off-journal-state-out-of-scope boundary, with an optional behavioral-replay escape hatch where event identity is load-bearing.
